title: U.S. and Iran Reach Agreement to Reopen Strait and Begin Nuclear Talks
summary_full: The accord halts hostilities in the war that began in February but leaves unresolved the critical issue of Iran’s nuclear program.
summary_public: The accord halts hostilities in the war that began in February but leaves unresolved the critical issue of Iran’s nuclear program.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: leaves unresolved the critical issue of Iran’s nuclear program.
